ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM exploitation chain (MSP-pivot → ransomware staging)
ucs.description: Hunts DragonForce's signature MSP/supply-chain access pattern: abuse of SimpleHelp RMM (CVE-2024-57726/57727/57728) to push tooling and stage ransomware on downstream tenants. This pivots on the SimpleHelp service spawning suspicious child processes — the exact sequence reported by Sophos MDR after DragonForce's May 2025 MSP compromise.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as child_proc values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("SimpleService.exe","Remote Access.exe","SimpleGatewayService.exe","SimpleHelp*")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*Invoke-WebRequest*","*DownloadString*","*-enc*","*FromBase64String*","*lsass*","*vssadmin*delete*","*wmic*shadowcopy*","*net*stop*","*bcdedit*")) by Processes.dest Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user host | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host_target | eval severity=case(match(process,"(?i)vssadmin|bcdedit|shadowcopy|stop-service"),"critical", match(process,"(?i)FromBase64String|-enc|DownloadString"),"high", true(),"medium") | sort - severity firstTime
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where InitiatingProcessFileName has_any ("SimpleService.exe", "Remote Access.exe", "SimpleGatewayService.exe") 
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has "SimpleHelp"
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","net.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe")
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","-enc ","FromBase64String","shadowcopy delete","vssadmin delete","bcdedit /set","sdclt","lsass")
| extend Severity = case(
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("vssadmin delete","shadowcopy delete","bcdedit /set"), "Critical",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ("FromBase64String","-enc ","DownloadString"), "High",
    "Medium")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, Severity, ReportId
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where RemoteUrl has_any ("mega.nz","mega.io","anonfiles","transfer.sh","filebin","tmpfiles")
         or RemotePort in (443,80) and InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","curl.exe","certutil.exe")
    | project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort, NetReportId=ReportId
) on DeviceName
| where isnull(NetTime) or (NetTime between (Timestamp .. (Timestamp + 10m)))
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: DragonForce (the Malaysian-origin RaaS that absorbed the leaked LockBit Black + Conti V3 builders) was directly attributed by Sophos to mass MSP compromise via SimpleHelp RMM CVE-chain in 2025, then living-off-the-RMM to stage their lockers on customer estates. Generic 'PowerShell from RMM' rules will fire on legitimate admin work; pinning the parent to the SimpleHelp service binaries plus their p

ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce pre-encryption inhibitors: BYOVD EDR-kill + shadow copy wipe combo
ucs.description: Detects DragonForce's documented pre-encryption ritual on the same host within minutes: dropping a vulnerable signed driver to disable AV/EDR (T1562.001/T1068) immediately followed by VSS/backup destruction (T1490) and service stops (T1489) before the LockBit-3-derived locker fires (T1486). Catches the actor in the ~5 minute window between kill-switch and ransom note.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*vssadmin*delete*shadows*","*wmic*shadowcopy*delete*","*bcdedit*recoveryenabled*No*","*bcdedit*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*","*wbadmin*delete*catalog*","*Stop-Service*","*sc*stop*","*sc*config*disabled*","*taskkill*/IM*") OR Processes.process_name IN ("PROCEXP152.sys","gmer.sys","truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys","aswArPot.sys","BadRabbit.sys","kArtaGO.sys")) by Processes.dest Processes.user host _time span=5m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eventstats dc(eval(if(match(cmds,"(?i)vssadmin|shadowcopy|bcdedit|wbadmin"),"recovery",null()))) as recovery_hits, dc(eval(if(match(cmds,"(?i)taskkill|Stop-Service|sc\\s+stop|sc\\s+config"),"svcstop",null()))) as svc_hits, dc(eval(if(match(procs,"(?i)\\.sys$")\,"driver",null()))) as drv_hits by dest | where (recovery_hits>=1 AND svc_hits>=1) OR drv_hits>=1 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 1h;
let bin_size = 5m;
let vuln_drivers = dynamic(["PROCEXP152.sys","gmer.sys","truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys","aswArPot.sys","kArtaGO.sys","viragt64.sys","DBUtil_2_3.sys"]);
let RecoveryWipe = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete")
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled no" or ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
     or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete")
| project DeviceId, DeviceName, RecoveryTime=Timestamp, RecoveryCmd=ProcessCommandLine, RecAccount=AccountName;
let SvcStop = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (FileName in~ ("net.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"))
     and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop ","Stop-Service","/IM ","config ", "disabled")
     and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("sql","veeam","backup","exchange","vss","sophos","defender","sentinelone","crowdstrike","mcafee","trend")
| project DeviceId, SvcTime=Timestamp, SvcCmd=ProcessCommandLine;
let DriverDrop = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| where FileName in~ (vuln_drivers) or FolderPath has "\\drivers\\" and FileName endswith ".sys"
| where InitiatingProcessFolderPath !startswith "C:\\Windows\\System32\\DriverStore"
| project DeviceId, DrvTime=Timestamp, DrvFile=FileName, DrvPath=FolderPath, DrvSHA=SHA256;
RecoveryWipe
| join kind=inner SvcStop on DeviceId
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', RecoveryTime, SvcTime)) <= 10
| join kind=leftouter DriverDrop on DeviceId
| extend WindowStart = min_of(RecoveryTime, SvcTime), Inhibitor_BYOVD = iff(isnotempty(DrvFile), "yes","no")
| summarize EarliestEvent=min(WindowStart), LatestEvent=max(WindowStart), 
            RecoveryCmds=make_set(RecoveryCmd,5), ServiceCmds=make_set(SvcCmd,5), 
            Drivers=make_set(DrvFile,5), DriverSHAs=make_set(DrvSHA,5)
            by DeviceName, DeviceId, RecAccount, Inhibitor_BYOVD
| extend Severity = iff(Inhibitor_BYOVD == "yes", "Critical", "High")
| order by EarliestEvent desc
ucs.rationale: DragonForce ransomware (built from leaked LockBit Black 3.0 and Conti V3 source) is documented by Group-IB, Sophos and Bitdefender to chain BYOVD EDR-killers (Truesight/RentDrv2/aswArPot variants) with the canonical LockBit pre-encryption commands — vssadmin shadow delete, bcdedit boot policy tampering, and stop of SQL/Veeam/AV services — all within minutes on the same host. Detecting any one of t
